name: coTfsODAddEntrySubIndexRange
title: coTfsODAddEntrySubIndexRange
syntax: long coTfsODAddEntrySubIndexRange( dword index, dword minSubIndex, dword maxSubIndex, dword accessType, dword entrySize, byte inMaskBuf[], dword maskBufSize, byte inValueBuf[], dword valueBufSize );
long coTfsODAddEntrySubIndexRange( dword index, dword minSubIndex, dword maxSubIndex, dword accessType, dword entrySize, qword mask, qword inValue );
description: The function adds several object entries to the internal list. The elements only differ in the given sub index. The default value can have a maximum size of 32 bit. The list is used by coTfsODChk and coTfsODChkNotExist.

parameters.name: entrySize
parameters.description: Data size of the object in byte.

parameters.name: inMaskBuf[]
parameters.description: Mask for data comparison, the size of the array must at least the same size of maskBufSize. Bit=1: execute comparison Bit=0: don't care

parameters.name: inValueBuf[]
parameters.description: Data for comparison, the size of the array must at least the same size of valueBufSize.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
